claim: How-to note: Question: do these documents define adequate completion conditions for new-PC install/recovery equivalence: app/data version parity, Codex/Claude MCP+hooks, Observatory/verifier launchers, uninstall/purge safety, release manifest, and GitHub data sync equivalence?
